sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ عَمَرُ وَأَبُوهُ إِلَى المَطْعَمِ لِلْغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Omer i otac su otišli u restoran na ručak.
sentences.translationEn: Omar and his father went to the restaurant for lunch.
They ordered food from the menu.

sentences.translation: Jeli su i razgovarali o svom danu.
sentences.translationEn: They ate and talked about their day.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الأَبُ الحِسَابَ وَدَفَعَ كَامِلَ المَبْلَغِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je zatražio račun i platio cijeli iznos.
sentences.translationEn: The father asked for the bill and paid the full amount.
